markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, review strategy, and demo the Atlas platform.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Driving Early Traffic:** The first three articles are already generating clicks, with "Shadow AI Security Risks" performing best. The publishing cadence is now at full speed (4-5 articles/week).](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Gated Guide Strategy Refined:** The focus will shift from ungating high-traffic guides (to protect their rankings and lead generation) to ungating guides with high traffic but low conversion, as these represent a clear opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [**PSG Product Content De-Prioritized:** Content for the Product Solutions Group (PSG)—products with reduced R\&D and marketing focus—will be de-prioritized to align with Netwrix's new strategic focus on core offerings.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [**Atlas Platform Demoed:** GrowthX's internal AI platform, Atlas, was demoed. It uses custom pipelines and a human-in-the-loop process to ensure content quality and accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Production

  - [**Early Performance:** The first three articles are already generating traffic, with clicks trending up.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Top Performer:** "Shadow AI Security Risks" is showing the most clicks and a high average keyword position.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:** The team is now at full speed, publishing 4-5 articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [**Review Feedback:** Mariel noted that article intros are too conversational and should be more direct for an IT audience.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**SEO Review Process:** To prevent issues like missing schema markup, Ralph and Ani will now conduct a final SEO review of all published content.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [**Process:** Use the content calendar to find links → perform on-page SEO checks.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

### Gated Guide Ungating Strategy

  - [**Initial Proposal:** Aida identified 7 guides as ungating candidates, avoiding those with high traffic to protect their rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [**Refined Strategy (from Philipp):**](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [**High Traffic + High Conversion:** Keep gated. These assets are working well for lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [**High Traffic + Low Conversion:** Ungate. This is the prime opportunity to capture existing interest with better content.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [**Low Traffic:** Ungate if strategically relevant.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Technical Requirement:** A new Atlas pipeline is needed to convert PDFs into articles, as the current workflow lacks this capability.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### PSG Product Content Strategy

  - [**Context:** James introduced the Product Solutions Group (PSG), a new category of products with reduced R\&D and marketing focus.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [**Decision:** Content for PSG products will be de-prioritized to align with Netwrix's strategic focus on core offerings.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)

### Atlas Platform Demo

  - [Aida demoed Atlas, GrowthX's internal AI content platform, to show how quality and accuracy are maintained.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
      - [**Artifacts:** A central repository of company context, writing guidelines, personas, and case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
      - [**Custom Pipelines:** Workflows are tailored for specific content types (e.g., competitor comparisons) to prevent AI context overload.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
      - [**Agentic Workflow:** A multi-step process for article generation:](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
        1.  [**Direction:** Define topic, keywords, and structure.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
        2.  [**Research:** An agent (Tavili) generates a comprehensive research document from authoritative sources.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
        3.  [**Drafting:** An agent drafts the article using all artifacts and research.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
        4.  [**Proofreading:** An agent grades the draft against a checklist (e.g., no contractions) and makes fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)
        5.  [**Human Review:** Manual checks for external links, stats, and final edits.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)

### Tooling & Reporting

  - [**Sanity CMS Glitch:** Updates to FAQs and TLDRs are not appearing live. The current workaround is to make a minor edit (e.g., add a space) to force a publish.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:** The dashboard is connected to the wrong Google Search Console property. GrowthX will fix this to enable performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)
      - [Update the Looker dashboard to connect to the correct GSC property.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)
      - [Add CTAs to the 3 published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [Implement Mariel's feedback on conversational intros.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Develop the new Atlas pipeline for ungating PDFs.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Netwrix:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
      - [Provide webinar transcripts to GrowthX via Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
      - [Prioritize the list of gated guides for ungating based on the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [Conduct final SEO reviews of all published content.](https://fathom.video/share/g6DgUmysNzCDk8i7HkaJpnf7sVDyiW4L?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
